novel_features.name: Sync to local archive
novel_features.description: Pull daily YouTube Analytics rows into a local SQLite archive so trends, comparisons, and history work offline.

novel_features.name: Channel report card
novel_features.description: Views, watch time, subscribers, and revenue for a period with the prior equal period and a delta beside each metric.

novel_features.name: Multi-channel rollup
novel_features.description: Every registered channel side by side for one period, one row per channel, sorted by views or revenue.

novel_features.name: What-changed digest
novel_features.description: Diffs two periods across every synced dimension and ranks the biggest movers — traffic sources, videos, revenue.

novel_features.name: Anomaly flag
novel_features.description: Flags metrics in the latest finalized period that fall outside the trailing mean and standard deviation.

novel_features.name: RPM tracker
novel_features.description: Monthly RPM, CPM, and monetized playbacks as a stable series after trailing re-sync settles late revenue adjustments.

novel_features.name: Top-movers
novel_features.description: Ranks videos by week-over-week view delta, surfacing both risers and faders.

novel_features.name: SQL escape hatch
novel_features.description: Runs read-only SQL directly against the local analytics archive for any aggregation the presets do not cover.

novel_features.name: Channel registry
novel_features.description: Maps friendly names like ScrollCore to channel IDs and credential sets so every command takes --channel by name.
